text: The openness of the first space makes me feel contemplative and a little disoriented, as though moments of transition are unfolding around me in this in-between architecture. In the second scene, surrounded by vibrant colors and the presence of research and development, I sense curiosity awakening in me. Here, I feel drawn to wonder how knowledge accumulates—how the crafted display of intellect, creativity, and technology might mirror the unfolding of self-understanding. Each scene moves me to question my own place within evolving environments and the ever-changing dance between solitude and participation.
